"""

Second question: Quantity. Count tasks: 7 tasks. Must output number in 'feedback' field. They want only number in 'feedback'? The spec: "Output only the number in 'feedback' field of JSON." Third: Completeness. We must judge if tasks represent complete research process: includes theoretical analysis, practical research, implementation, validation. Tasks: 1) research and compare types, evaluate pros/cons. 2) look at existing formations. 3) analyze where AI can be integrated. 4) identify places in rescue process where drone swarm can be used. 5) propose modified rescue mission process including AI-integrated swarm. 6) identify algorithms that could be used in modified stages and compare them. 7) identify advantages and disadvantages of swarm usage in rescue missions. All tasks are one sentence. So Format: true.

Fifth: Structure. Are tasks using infinitive verbs at beginning? Let's examine. In Latvian, infinitive verbs like "izpētīt", "apskatīt", "analizēt", "identificēt", "ieteikt", etc. Yes, each starts with infinitive. So structure: true.

Sixth: Clarity. Are tasks short, straightforward, concise? They are fairly short. Might be some missing punctuation or grammar errors. But overall clear. So compliance true.

Seventh: Relevance. Are tasks ordered to contribute to goal? Goal: examine drone swarm management using AI integration in missing person search. Tasks: 1) explore types, evaluate pros/cons for AI integration. 2) look at formations. 3) analyze integration points. 4) identify use places. 5) propose modified process. 6) identify algorithms and compare. 7) identify pros/cons.
